z<Tests for making sure experimental imports work as expected.
assert_run_python_scriptc
    from sklearn.experimental import enable_halving_search_cv
    from sklearn.model_selection import HalvingGridSearchCV
    from sklearn.model_selection import HalvingRandomSearchCV
    z
    import sklearn.model_selection
    from sklearn.experimental import enable_halving_search_cv
    from sklearn.model_selection import HalvingGridSearchCV
    from sklearn.model_selection import HalvingRandomSearchCV
    aa
    import pytest
    with pytest.raises(ImportError, match='HalvingGridSearchCV is experimental'):
        from sklearn.model_selection import HalvingGridSearchCV
    import sklearn.experimental
    with pytest.raises(ImportError, match='HalvingRandomSearchCV is experimental'):
        from sklearn.model_selection import HalvingRandomSearchCV
    )
textwrap
dedent)
good_importZ&good_import_with_model_selection_firstZ

_/usr/lib64/python3.9/site-packages/sklearn/experimental/tests/test_enable_successive_halving.py
